title: Better Cobblemon Spectation
description: Improves how battles are spectated in Cobblemon
body:
# Better Cobblemon Spectation

Better Cobblemon Spectation is a client-side Cobblemon addon that makes spectating battles feel more cinematic.

Instead of using the normal player point of view, BattleCam controls the camera during spectating and adds dynamic angles, smooth movement, zooms, and cleaner presentation for singles and doubles battles.

It is designed for tournaments, events, streams, videos, and general spectating, while still letting players choose whether they want the cinematic camera or normal Cobblemon spectating.


![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d94fdac95a84797144f1ab05b8b58d8f2f75c7b9.png)


## Features

* Cinematic Cobblemon battle spectating
* Automatic rotating camera shots
* Manual camera shot control
* Smooth movement, zooms, and transitions
* Singles and doubles battle support
* Cleaner spectator HUD
* Client-side only

## How to Use

BattleCam activates when you spectate a Cobblemon battle using Cobblemon’s normal spectate feature.

Press **F6** to cycle between camera modes:

* **OFF** — Normal Cobblemon spectating
* **AUTO** — Automatically rotates through cinematic shots
* **MANUAL** — Keeps BattleCam active while you control the shots

## Manual Controls

While in **MANUAL** mode:

* **F7** — Next shot
* **F8** — Previous shot

## Clean Spectator View

While BattleCam is active, normal survival HUD elements are hidden for a cleaner view, including the hotbar, hand render, crosshair, hearts, armor, hunger, XP bar, and level.

A small BattleCam HUD remains visible so you can see the current mode and selected shot.
